title: アオハル杯3戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the third round of the Unity Cup preseason!
Haru Urara is brimming with confidence in the
waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know we're gonna win today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's because I am! We worked really hard, and
we've all grown really close to each other!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I dunno why, but that makes me feel like we can
win this!
